content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

November 17, 2005

Charlie Peters
84 Hoy Avenue
Fords, NJ 08863

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-230

Dear Mr. Peters:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice of November 7, 2005. Your inquiry primarily presents issues which are outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act"). Under the provisions of regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, any request not meeting the requirements for formal written advice, must be declined by this agency.

Should you need assistance in the future, you may contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosure
JWW:rd

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California code of Regulations.
